prompt: i took this photo of a candle: /Users/jelle.vanelburg/fantasy-sprites/eval-workspace/test-inputs/my_candle_photo.jpg - can you turn it into a sprite for the tavern scenes in my game? its a small prop that sits on tables so it shouldnt be big
assertions: A sprite PNG file is delivered in the outputs directory
The photo background was removed: all four corner pixels are fully transparent
The sprite is small-prop-sized: longest side is between 8 and 32 pixels
The sprite uses at most 16 unique opaque colors (pixel-art palette discipline)
Every opaque color in the sprite is an exact color from the house palette (assets/palette.txt)
Alpha is hard: every pixel is fully opaque or fully transparent (no semi-transparent fringe)
